---
title: "test_benchmark_engine_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_benchmark_engine_empire.py"
loc: 11
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.85
style_score: 4.41
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.20
---

## Intent
The `test_benchmark_engine_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_benchmark_logic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_benchmark_logic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.4/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.benchmark_engine](file://src.tools.benchmark_engine)

### Exports
- `test_benchmark_logic`
